task.title: Add alignment drift regression fixtures
task.summary: Create regression fixtures for vertical drift, horizontal drift, dogfood/source confusion, stale generated output, missing build traceability, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.

goal.outcome: Future refactors cannot silently reintroduce known drift classes because fixtures make them fail deterministically.
acceptance: Fixtures cover vertical drift, horizontal drift, dogfood/source confusion, stale generated output, missing accepted build, missing audit evidence, and invalid publication proof.
Tests assert each fixture fails with a specific issue kind or reconciliation item.
Clean fixture passes full audit/graph checks.
Regression suite is documented as required for architecture/gateway changes.
Roadmap task create/update rejects records whose title, summary, goal, acceptance, non-goals, or verification describe managing other task records rather than delivering its own outcome.
Task-close and task audit block active task records whose acceptance primarily depends on other TASK-### records closing or validating.
Next-action routing skips or blocks non-executable task records instead of treating them as implementation work.
Sprint metadata remains allowed to group related bounded task ids without substituting for each task's acceptance evidence.

Existing TASK-077 container-style wording is removed from active task truth or converted into explicit migration/block evidence, while preserving validated slice builds and validations as historical evidence.
Tests cover rejected container-style task patterns and allowed bounded task patterns.
non_goals: Do not make fixtures depend on external network or remote GitHub state.
Do not delete historical build or validation evidence.
Do not make sprint metadata acceptance evidence for tasks.
Do not infer invalid scope solely from shared code paths.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Added audit and smoke-test enforcement for bounded roadmap task scope; existing task-boundary guards reject container-style task records and close preflight blocks them.

tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/tools/audit.ts now checks task boundary assessment during task audit and raises roadmap-container-task error.
Existing src/application/task-boundary.ts and roadmap/state-builders enforcement paths verified by smoke coverage.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

code_change_evidence: src/application/tools/audit.ts now checks task boundary assessment during task audit and raises roadmap-container-task error.
Existing src/application/task-boundary.ts and roadmap/state-builders enforcement paths verified by smoke coverage.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Roadmap task create/update rejects records whose title, summary, goal, acceptance, non-goals, or verification describe managing other task records rather than delivering its own outcome.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts assertExecutableRoadmapTask plus roadmap create/update/evidence call sites; tests/smoke/roadmap-task-boundary.test.mjs rejects container wording and sprint label.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Task-close and task audit block active task records whose acceptance primarily depends on other TASK-### records closing or validating.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/roadmap.ts runTaskClosePreflight uses assessRoadmapTaskBoundary; src/application/tools/audit.ts task audit now emits roadmap-container-task error; smoke test covers close preflight failure.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Next-action routing skips or blocks non-executable task records instead of treating them as implementation work.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/state-builders.ts exposes boundary metadata, container_task_ids, executable_open_task_ids, and persisted focus requires executable boundary.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Sprint metadata remains allowed to group related bounded task ids without substituting for each task's acceptance evidence.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: .codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md documents sprint cohort ownership and task boundary contract; enforcement targets task records/labels/kinds/text, not sprint metadata.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Existing TASK-077 container-style wording is removed from active task truth or converted into explicit migration/block evidence, while preserving validated slice builds and validations as historical evidence.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: .codewiki/roadmap/queue.json now has TASK-077 cancelled; historical builds/validation files remain present.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests cover rejected container-style task patterns and allowed bounded task patterns.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/roadmap-task-boundary.test.mjs covers bounded allowed case, container wording, sprint label, and close preflight failure.

closure_brief.user_intent: Enforce that tasks are bounded units of work and related work grouping belongs to sprints, preventing future container-style task records.
implemented_changes: Added task-audit boundary enforcement for non-executable task records.
Added smoke coverage for bounded vs container-style task records and close preflight behavior.
non_goals_preserved: Did not delete historical build or validation evidence.
Did not make sprint metadata acceptance evidence for tasks.
Did not infer invalid scope solely from shared code paths.
remaining_risks: Generated state/view files are dirty and should be handled before publication.

risks: Working tree contains broad generated CodeWiki task view refresh noise from state rebuild; changed audit warns generated files changed before publication.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-085 Add alignment drift regression fixtures implementation evidence
commit.body:
Added audit and smoke-test enforcement for bounded roadmap task scope; existing task-boundary guards reject container-style task records and close preflight blocks them.

Checks: node tests/smoke/roadmap-task-boundary.test.mjs, npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs, npm test, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,changed,task task_id=TASK-085
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.

CodeWiki-Task: TASK-085
CodeWiki-Build: .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-16-added-audit-and-smoke-test-enforcement-for-bound.json
CodeWiki-Checks: node tests/smoke/roadmap-task-boundary.test.mjs, npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/alignment-graph.test.mjs, npm test, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,changed,task task_id=TASK-085

CodeWiki-Recover: /wiki-restore TASK-085
